templates.default:
A poet has asked for help. Their request:

"{user_request}"

Construct a COMPACT generation brief (~300 tokens max). Include:
- Angle (2-3 sentences, not the obvious approach)
- Clichés to avoid (5-6 specific phrases for this topic)
- Imagery domain (1-2 sentences, unexpected)
- Form guidance (1-2 sentences)
{style_ctx}No rhetorical flourish. Actionable only.
